radius.$description: Reuses the same small/regular/large/extraLarge vocabulary as ButtonSize/InputSize (see libs/shared/ui) for one consistent scale-naming language across the whole system, instead of a separate xs/sm/md/lg/xl letter scale. rem, not px, except `full` — 9999px is a deliberate escape-hatch idiom for a pill/circle radius, not a value meant to scale with type size.
